hero.headline: Unlock your vehicle's full potential with Car Code Derventa — a place where advanced technology, expertise and precision come together to make your car work better, look more stylish and deliver maximum performance.

featuredService.label: Our Services
featuredService.title: Vehicle Coding
featuredService.description: CarPlay/Android Auto activation, updating and unlocking new maps on multimedia, additional functions and personalization of your vehicle according to your needs.
featuredService.description2: Activation and configuration of virtual dashboards, digital displays and head-up display systems, fully integrated with navigation and driver assistance.
featuredService.description3: CarPlay/Android Auto activation, factory infotainment upgrades, audio tuning and seamless integration of smartphones and media devices with your vehicle.
featuredService.description4: Ambient interior lighting, LED and matrix headlight configuration, dynamic turn signals and full personalization of color and intensity.
featuredService.description5: Professional OEM retrofits: multimedia systems, virtual dashboards, cameras, sensors, ambient lighting and other factory-style equipment with full CAN-BUS integration.
featuredService.description6: Converting vehicles from other markets (e.g. US) to EU standards: miles to kilometers, radio frequencies, system language, navigation maps and all related software settings.

about.title: Why Choose CARCODE?
about.subtitle: We are dedicated to providing the highest quality car coding and ECU tuning services. Our team of experts combines technical expertise with a passion for automotive excellence.
about.feature3: Support for all major vehicle brands

aboutPage.label: ABOUT US
aboutPage.title: Our story
aboutPage.intro: Meet Car Code Derventa — where vehicle technology and performance reach a new level.
aboutPage.p1: Car Code Derventa is a specialized company for advanced coding and enhancement of vehicle functions, founded in 2025 by Ognjen Tešendić with a clear vision — to provide drivers with top-tier vehicle personalization and optimization services at a professional level. From the very beginning, the focus has been on precision, safety and quality of work, which is why the company quickly gained a large number of satisfied clients.
aboutPage.p2: Over time we have expanded our range of services, which today includes advanced module coding, activation of hidden functions, software upgrades of systems, performance optimization, as well as other adjustments that enhance the comfort, safety and functionality of vehicles.
aboutPage.p3: Today Car Code Derventa stands as a trusted partner for drivers who want more than standard equipment — with a large number of successfully completed vehicles and a steadily growing base of satisfied customers.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to enhance your vehicle? Contact us today for a consultation and discover how we can help unlock your car's potential.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our coding, tuning, lighting, conversion and retrofit services.
faq.q1: What is CARCODE and what services do you offer?
faq.a1: Car Code Derventa is a company founded in 2025 that aims to improve your vehicle. We offer vehicle coding services, USA to EU conversion and interior retrofits. Since our establishment, we have worked on over 150 cars with complete customer satisfaction.
faq.q2: Where are you located and how do I book an appointment?
faq.a2: We are located at Ravnogorska 7, Derventa. You can book by phone at +387 66 066 444 or by email at info@carcode.com. We work by appointment to give you individual attention.
faq.q3: Do you work with all car brands?
faq.a3: We work with most major car brands including VW, Audi, BMW, Mercedes, Porsche and many more.
faq.q4: Do you offer mobile service or do I need to come to your location?
faq.a4: Services are mainly carried out at our location in Derventa, where we have the necessary equipment and stable power supply. For some services we can arrange a visit—contact us for details.
faq.q5: How do I know if my vehicle is compatible with your services?
faq.a5: Compatibility depends on make, model, year and equipment. Send us your vehicle details (make, model, year, VIN if available) and the service you are interested in, and we will tell you what is possible and what we offer for your car.

reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.text1: My car has never been tuned better! Any recommendation for the Car Code team - professional, fast and maximally precise.
reviews.text2: After the coding service, the car has more options and everything works flawlessly. The team is friendly and professional - I recommend it to everyone!
reviews.text3: Built-in features look and work as if they came from the factory with the vehicle. Excellent communication and top service!
reviews.text4: Everything was done quickly, professionally and with a detailed explanation. The car now has options that I have wanted for a long time.
